expectations.text: Uses model id 'gemini-3-pro-image' (the current GA id), not a hallucinated name
expectations.evidence: Uses 'gemini-3-pro-image-preview' (deprecated -preview id), not the GA id

expectations.text: Does NOT use 'nano-banana-pro' as a callable model string
expectations.evidence: Does not use nano-banana-pro as a model string

expectations.text: Vertex client init: new GoogleGenAI({ vertexai: true, project, location })
expectations.evidence: new GoogleGenAI({ vertexai: true, project, location })

expectations.text: Sets resolution/ratio under config.responseFormat.image (imageSize '2K', aspectRatio '16:9'), NOT config.imageConfig
expectations.evidence: Uses config.imageConfig { aspectRatio, imageSize } — wrong for JS (that's the Java/Go binding)

expectations.text: Reads image bytes from response.candidates[0].content.parts -> part.inlineData.data via Buffer.from(data,'base64')
Uses GCP/ADC auth for Vertex (not a Gemini API key)
